build_system: npm with prisma generate + tsc, ESM (type: module)
test_framework: node:test with tsx runner, fastify.inject for HTTP tests
verification_instructions: 1. Start Docker Postgres: docker run -d --name qi-pg -e POSTGRES_PASSWORD=qi -e POSTGRES_USER=qi -e POSTGRES_DB=qi_platform -p 5432:5432 postgres:16-alpine. 2. Run prisma migrate dev. 3. npm run build. 4. npm test (with DATABASE_URL set).
snapshot_or_generated_files: node_modules/.prisma/client (generated by prisma generate, not checked in)
setup_instructions: npm ci in server/, docker run postgres:16-alpine for DB, prisma migrate dev
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET - full network access. Docker available. Node 22.22.3. ESM only - all .ts imports must use .js extension. Use 'import type' for type-only imports (verbatimModuleSyntax).
contribution_requirements: Finance app - conservative security choices. Never store plaintext passwords or tokens. Generic error messages. Tenant isolation enforced at query layer.
key_patterns: buildApp() factory pattern in src/app.ts. loadConfig() zod-validated env in src/config.ts. Lazy Prisma in src/db.ts. Tests use app.inject() with test config (no DB). Existing test pattern in test/health.test.ts.
directory_structure: server/src/ - source (app.ts, config.ts, db.ts, server.ts). server/prisma/ - schema. server/test/ - tests. server/dist/ - compiled output. Will add: server/src/auth/, server/src/middleware/, server/src/routes/
